title: Spanish 1 – Greetings and Basics
description: Introductory Spanish for high school: greetings, numbers 1–20, and basic questions (name, origin).

topics.title: Greetings and introductions
topics.content: Learn common greetings (hola, buenos días, ¿cómo te llamas?), how to introduce yourself, and ask someone's name.
learning_objectives: Say hello and goodbye in Spanish
Ask and answer 'What is your name?'

topics.title: Numbers 1–20
topics.content: Count from 1 to 20, use numbers in simple phrases (age, phone digits).

topics.title: Where are you from?
topics.content: Ask and answer about origin: ¿De dónde eres? Countries and nationalities.
learning_objectives: Use ser (soy, eres, es) for origin
